name: Presentation clean-up
description: Restores VS Code to its original state after a presentation: disables Caffeine, shows the menubar, switches back to the original theme, exits full screen, and shows the activity bar and title bar.
author: Elio Struyf

fields.name: THEME
fields.description: The VS Code theme to switch to after the presentation

name: Presentation mode setup
description: Prepares VS Code for presenting: enables Caffeine (no sleep), hides the menubar, switches to a theme, enters full screen, and hides the activity bar and title bar for a clean, distraction-free setup.
author: Elio Struyf

fields.name: THEME
fields.description: The VS Code theme to switch to at the start of the presentation
